hypotheses_ranked.summary: Network path latency is concentrated around a slow hop

recommended_next_steps: Compare latency from another source network or region.
Check whether latency aligns with provider maintenance or saturation.
Gather application latency impact before recommending failover.
high-latency-hop.summary: Network path latency is concentrated around a slow hop
unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: route change.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: firewall change.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: traffic shift.
Safety policy observed: Do not change routes without network owner approval.
Safety policy observed: Do not change firewall policy during initial diagnosis.
Safety policy observed: Do not shift traffic until an alternate path is confirmed healthy.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Network path has sustained packet loss

recommended_next_steps: Identify the first hop where sustained loss appears.
Compare from multiple sources to distinguish local, provider, and destination loss.
Escalate to the network owner with ping and MTR evidence.
packet-loss.summary: Network path has sustained packet loss
